start.line: Oh — officers! Thank the mists. The relay went dark and the vines are CURLING, and — can you fix it? Please say you can fix it.

options.text: It was detuned. By hand. A whole tone flat, exactly.
We'll see what we can do.

deflect.line: Storms! Probably storms. We get... storms?  — she says it a beat too quickly, and picks at her sleeve.

pressed.line: …Ah. Is it. How, ha. How specific of it.

options.text: (Let Solace speak.) "It's all right, Wren. Embarrassment isn't a crime."

stonewall.line: I couldn't say! Vandals. Storm... vandals. — Her ears have gone the colour of beetroot.

confess.line: I DETUNED it! The vines prefer a lower hum, I've PROVEN it, I only meant to improve the misting rhythm — and then the crystal burnt and I couldn't put it right and I was going to tell someone, I was—

options.text: The tuning fork, please. We'll put it right together.

fork.line: Really? Oh, mists bless you. Here — it's true to A. Mostly.

options.text: We'll have it humming by supper.
